metadata.description: Public Claude Code plugins — conventional commits, code review, AI image generation, and large codebase search

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Write conventional commits automatically. Stages changes, analyzes the diff, and crafts a Conventional Commits message with the right type, scope, and summary.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review code for correctness, security, performance, and style. Works on staged diffs, individual files, or GitHub PRs. Returns structured findings with P0-P3 severity levels.

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: AI image generation with expert prompt engineering. Supports fal.ai, Together AI, Replicate, OpenAI, Stability AI via API, and Higgsfield Nano Banana Pro / Google Gemini via browser automation.

plugins.name: agent-repo-search
plugins.description: Efficiently search and ingest large codebases using structural indexing and token-aware CXML chunking.
